name: BTSE200 LED Profile Spot
comment: BTSE200 LED Profile Spot Engine 200W Warm White: The BTSE200 is a Profile spotlight that features a powerful 200W LED source and is designed to replace traditional profile spotlights. Flicker free operation makes this light well adapted to TV and film. The entire fixture is enclosed in a robust matte black housing with an Iris and gobo slot with holder. With the built-in four-bladed manual shutter system, the BTSE200 offers superior control to shape the beam the way you want it. Optional 19°, 26° and 36° lenses are available. (sold separately)
